languages.label: English
languages.safety_suffix: No vocals unless requested. No copyrighted melody. No artist imitation.

languages.label: German
languages.safety_suffix: Keine Cover, keine bekannten Melodien, keine Kuenstlerimitation.

languages.label: French
languages.safety_suffix: Pas de reprises, pas de melodies connues, pas d'imitation d'artiste.

languages.label: Spanish
languages.safety_suffix: Sin covers, sin melodias famosas, sin imitacion de artistas.
